positive: A symmetrical, stylized illustration of a whimsical forest scene with bioluminescent mushrooms and floating lanterns. The main subject is a stylized, friendly fox curled up amongst oversized, gently glowing flora. The style should be neo-art nouveau with clean lines and strong outlines, resembling vector art on a dark, nocturnal background. Use a limited color palette of deep indigo, emerald green, gold, and cyan for high contrast. Composition must be centered and highly scalable for apparel printing. Dramatic rim lighting from the glowing flora, cinematic composition, perfect for screen printing.
